payload.description:
## Problem
`plexus score pull` is not registered on the correct Click group in `plexus/cli/score/scores.py`.

The decorator is currently:
- `@score.command()`

but the module registers commands on the `scores` group (e.g., `@scores.command()`). This prevents expected pull command behavior/discovery.

## Expected
- `pull` is registered with the same group as other score subcommands.
- `plexus score pull ...` is available and routes to the pull handler.

## Scope
- Update the command decorator to register `pull` on `scores`.
- Validate CLI command availability locally.

## Definition of Done
- Decorator uses `@scores.command()`.
- Local validation confirms `pull` appears in score CLI commands.
payload.title: Fix score pull command registration in score CLI group
